Title: Reduce expert hub dominance

Description:
Expert 1 is heavily overused across all regimes.

Goal:
Encourage more balanced expert utilization.

Ideas:
- Load balancing loss
- Entropy regularization across experts
- Penalizing dominant expert usage

Looking for:
- Experimental results
- Alternative routing strategies
